name: Sanctions.io
description: sanctions.io offers a simple, cost-effective screening API for AML compliance with real-time sanctions and PEP checks, averaging ~350ms response times and designed for easy integration into onboarding flows.

seo.title: Sanctions.io — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Sanctions.io: sanctions.io offers a simple, cost-effective screening API for AML compliance with real-time sanctions and PEP checks, averaging ~350ms response t

when_to_use: Low-latency AML sanctions check at user onboarding (~350ms)
PEP screening API for cost-effective compliance integration
Developer-friendly REST API for fintech AML workflows
Real-time screening for payment authorization pipelines
Affordable per-call pricing model for startup compliance

cons: No KYC, docs or case management included
Adverse media narrower than full AML vendors
Smaller data sources than tier-1 providers
Not ideal for complex enterprise workflows
review.verdict: Simple screening API done well; pair with a KYC and case-management vendor for full compliance.
review.best_for: Startups and developers needing fast, cheap sanctions and PEP screening behind an onboarding flow
review.not_for: Large firms needing bundled KYC, adverse media depth and audit-ready case management workflows
